cards.headline: 14 Years. 7 Countries. 130+ Projects.
cards.body: You've worked across SaaS, ed-tech, cannabis tech, career coaching, and digital nomad retreats. Most people pick a lane. You built a highway interchange.

cards.headline: You Turn Zero Into Systems
cards.body: Every single role follows the same pattern: you walk into something that doesn't exist yet and build the playbook. LeafLogix Canada. freeCodeConf. ClearCareer's AI toolkit. You're not an operator. You're a launcher.

cards.headline: The AI Gives You a Multiplier
cards.body: While other coaches are still using Google Docs, you built custom GPTs, a Claude Code marketing agent, an AI client manager, and an AI headshot platform. Your tech stack is your moat, and most competitors don't even know it exists.

cards.headline: Founder Mode Is a Ceiling
cards.body: You've been self-employed for most of the last decade. That's freedom, but it's also a cap. No one's pushing your salary up, no one's promoting you, and your income is directly tied to your hours. The 200+ clients prove the demand. The question is whether you want to keep doing it yourself.

cards.headline: You Should Be Running AI Programs
cards.body: The market is screaming for people who can design AI-powered learning and enablement at scale. You've already done it for 200+ clients. The next move is doing it inside a company with 10,000 employees and a budget that matches the impact you've already proven.
